content: Do you have inventory you're looking to clear? We are buying surplus parts, lots, and engine parts. Consignment options also available! Get in touch now.

Two engines. One final journey. The next chapter starts here. These CFM56-7B engines have arrived at our Newport engine shop, where they'll be carefully inducted for teardown. Every component will be assessed, harvested and returned to service - extending asset life and supporting fleets around the world. From teardown through to trade and lease, this is how we turn experience into practical outcomes for our customers. Watch the video and speak to our team about how we can support your engine requirements.

Available for immediate lease: Boeing 737-800 with 180 seats configuration. Aircraft currently operating in Asia, full maintenance records available. Suitable for charter or scheduled operations. Minimum lease term 24 months.
Urgent requirement: CFM56-5B engine modules including FAN, LPC, HPC, HPT, LPT. Looking for serviceable or overhauled condition. Immediate payment available for quality parts.
Our MRO facility in Dubai now offers Airbus A320 family C-check services with 30-day turnaround. EASA, FAA, and GCAA certified. Specializing in structural repairs and cabin refurbishment.
Boeing 747-400F available for sale. Cargo configuration, excellent maintenance history, recently completed D-check. Suitable for heavy cargo operations.
Seeking investors for aviation asset fund targeting engine portfolios. Focus on CFM56 and V2500 engine assets. Target IRR 15-18%. Minimum investment $1M.
Offering aircraft technical consulting for lessors and operators. Specializing in lease return conditions, technical inspections, and asset management. Global coverage available.
Pratt & Whitney PW1100G-JM engine overhaul capacity available starting Q3 2026. Our facility in Singapore is EASA and FAA certified. Offering competitive pricing and 90-day turnaround.
Available: Boeing 787 Dreamliner cabin refurbishment packages. Includes premium economy seats, LED lighting system, and new galley equipment. Complete design and installation services.
New FAA regulations for aircraft cybersecurity. We offer compliance consulting and security assessment services for airlines and MROs. Protecting your digital assets in the connected aviation era.
Available from stock: Airbus A320neo landing gear components. Full shipset available for immediate delivery. All parts come with full traceability and dual certification (EASA/FAA).
